description:
After each of the three SystemV-shim dispatches in run_quantum (parked_cont resume, pending_main_entry, pending_closure_entry), check process.heap.should_gc(); if set, call process.heap.gc() (stub) and clear the flag. Roots come from process.parked_cont per §7 (consumed by .8's Cheney body, not by the stub).

Touch:
- src/ir_codegen.rs run_quantum (~line 239): three insertion points, one per dispatch.

Acceptance: with a synthetic test that allocs past gc_threshold, gc_run_count >= 1 after run_until_idle. (Update one of the previously-ignored GC trigger tests to assert this against the new model, or file a new minimal fixture-driven test.)
title: fz-cps.GC.1.3: park-time GC hook in run_quantum
